description: VERIFIED LIVE: Google News via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Google News renders each story as an article link (href starting ./read/) whose text is the headline, so this tool reads them straight from the DOM of your open Google News tab. Navigate the tab to news.google.com (home, a topic, or a search) and let it load, then call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on the home page: 82 stories with headline and (relative) article url extracted correctly.

tools.name: google_news_headlines
tools.description: Story links on the current Google News page (home, a topic section, or search results). Navigate the tab there and let it load first. Returns each story's headline and (relative ./read/…) article url. VERIFIED (82 stories).
